_README: Auto-generated by scripts/enrich-plans.mjs from excercises.json. Do not hand-edit; re-run the script. loadConfig is the shared global; userProfileTemplate is the per-user runtime shape. See DEV_BRIEF_weights_reps.md.

loadConfig.fitbodSource: arXiv:2603.17495 — 303,494 near-failure sets; 17-22% more consistent than the classics

warmupRamp.note: Generated for main lifts; never logged for progression.

loadConfig.seedNote: Ratios give a conservative working weight for ~5 reps; the first 1-2 logged sessions autoregulate it.

userProfileTemplate._note: Cold-start profile: empty lifts/exerciseState. getPrescription() seeds via seedE1RM + referenceLift; applyProgression() fills these in after each session.

loadScheme.note: Main lifts (Squat, Bench, Row, Deadlift, Press) are RAMPED: the listed sets/reps are the ASCENDING ramp to ONE top set, NOT straight sets at one weight. ~10-15% jumps per set up to the top set.

weekly.wednesdaySquat: sets 1-3 same as Monday; set 4 repeats set 3

fridayTriple.note: becomes next Monday's top set of 5

loadScheme.start: place current 5RM at week 4; back-calc weeks 1-3 at -2.5%/week so you start light
loadScheme.reset: when MOST lifts stall, drop back several weeks and rebuild over ~4 weeks
loadScheme.fridayRowsBenchSquatStored: sets:6 reps:5/3/8 is shorthand for 4x5 + 1x3(PR) + 1x8(backoff); use this loadScheme for the real structure

loadScheme.note: CRITICAL: every exercise's `reps` value is the TOTAL rep goal across ALL its sets, NOT per-set. Per-set target = round(reps / sets). Examples: Bench 5 sets / 15 = 5x3 (heavy); Cable Crossover 5 sets / 50 = 5x10; Dips 3 sets / 30 = 3x10. Do NOT prescribe the raw `reps` value per set for this plan.
loadScheme.restPause: accessories are rest-pause: 15-60s within an exercise, 2-3 min between exercises

loadScheme.note: Main-lift `reps: 5/3/1` is the WEEKLY WAVE, not one session. All loads are % of Training Max (TM = 90% of true 1RM). The program cycles waves A->B->C->D across weeks; the last work set each week (except deload) is AMRAP.
loadScheme.supplemental: the `(Supplemental)` 5x10 entries are Boring But Big at ~50% of TM
loadScheme.reset: miss the AMRAP target -> drop TM by 10% and rebuild

exercises.name: Two Arm Dumbbell Overhead Tricep Extension
Lying Two Arm Dumbbell Tricep Extension

barbell-bench-press.name: Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie flat on the bench with your shoulder blades pulled together and your feet planted firmly on the floor.
Keep your head, shoulders, and glutes in contact with the bench throughout the set.
Grip the bar just outside shoulder width and unrack it so your arms are extended over your shoulders.
Brace your core and lower the bar to mid-chest, keeping your elbows about 45 degrees from your torso.
Lightly touch the chest, then press the bar back up to the starting position.

dumbbell-incline-bench-press.name: Incline Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions: Set the bench to a 45-60 degree incline and lie back with your shoulder blades retracted.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand positioned just outside shoulder width.
Brace your core and press the dumbbells up until your arms are extended over your shoulders.
Lower the dumbbells under control to chest level, keeping elbows about 45 degrees from your torso.
Press back to the start.

bent-over-barbell-row.name: Bent Over Row
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart and a loaded barbell over your mid-foot.
Brace your core, hinge at the hips and slightly bend your knees until your torso is near parallel to the floor.
Grip the bar with palms facing your body and let it hang at knee height.
Pull the bar to your lower stomach, driving your elbows back at about 45 degrees.
Lower the bar under control and repeat.

lat-pulldown.name: Lat Pull Down
instructions: Attach a bar to the pulldown cable and grip it slightly wider than shoulder width, palms forward.
Sit upright with your knees secured under the pad and brace your core.
With arms extended overhead, pull the bar down toward your upper chest, leaning back slightly.
Squeeze your back at the bottom, then extend your arms back to the start under control.

barbell-shoulder-press.name: Overhead Press
instructions: Set the bar at shoulder height and grip it just outside shoulder width.
Unrack the bar onto the front of your shoulders with forearms vertical, and step back.
Brace your core and glutes, then press the bar straight overhead.
At lockout the bar should be aligned over your ears; lower it back to your shoulders under control.

barbell-curl.name: Barbell Curl
instructions: Stand tall holding a barbell at shoulder width with palms facing forward.
Brace your core and keep your elbows pinned at your sides.
Curl the bar up to shoulder height without swinging your torso.
Lower the bar under control back to the start.

skullcrusher.name: Skullcrusher
instructions: Lie on a flat bench holding a barbell (or EZ bar) with a shoulder-width grip over your shoulders.
Keep your upper arms vertical and stationary throughout.
Bend at the elbows to lower the bar toward your forehead.
Extend your elbows to press the bar back to the starting position.

back-squat.name: Squat (Back Squat)
instructions: Set the bar just below shoulder height and grip it outside shoulder width.
Step under the bar to rest it on your upper back, unrack, and set your feet shoulder-width apart.
Brace your core and descend by hinging the hips back while keeping your chest up.
Track your knees out over your toes and descend until your thighs are at least parallel.
Drive back up to the standing position.

deadlift.name: Deadlift
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart and the bar over your mid-foot.
Hinge at the hips and bend your knees to grip the bar just outside your legs.
Set a flat back with chest up and brace your core.
Drive through the floor, extending hips and knees together to stand tall with the bar close to your body.
Reverse the path under control to return the bar to the floor.

leg-press.name: Leg Press
instructions: Sit in the leg press with your back and hips against the pad and feet shoulder-width on the platform.
Press the platform up and release the safety bars.
Lower the platform by bending your knees, tracking them over your toes, until your back stays flat.
Press back up without locking the knees aggressively.

seated-leg-curl.name: Leg Curl (Seated)
instructions: Sit in the leg curl machine with the lower pad against the back of your ankles and the top pad above your knees.
Grip the handles and brace your core.
Curl your heels down and back by bending your knees as far as possible.
Return under control to the starting position.

calf-raise.name: Calf Raise
instructions: Stand tall with feet about hip-width apart.
Raise your heels off the floor by pushing through the balls of your feet as high as possible.
Pause at the top, then lower your heels under control.

barbell-incline-bench-press.name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Set the bench to a 45-60 degree incline and lie back with shoulder blades retracted.
Grip the bar just outside shoulder width and unrack it over your shoulders.
Brace and lower the bar to your upper chest with elbows about 45 degrees from your torso.
Press the bar back up to the start.

dumbbell-fly.name: Flat Bench Dumbbell Flye
instructions: Lie flat on a bench holding a dumbbell in each hand over your shoulders, palms facing in, elbows slightly bent.
Keep a fixed slight bend in your elbows throughout.
Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until level with your chest.
Squeeze your chest to bring the dumbbells back together over your shoulders.

cable-row.name: Seated Cable Row
instructions: Sit at the cable row with feet on the plates and knees slightly bent.
Grasp the handle with a straight back and a slight forward lean.
Pull the handle to your torso while bringing your torso to upright.
Squeeze your shoulder blades together, then return under control while keeping tension.

dumbbell-row.name: One Arm Dumbbell Row
instructions: Place one knee and hand on a flat bench with your torso parallel to the floor.
Hold a dumbbell in the opposite hand with your arm extended and a flat back.
Pull the dumbbell straight up to the side of your torso, keeping the torso still.
Pause briefly, then lower under control.

dumbbell-lateral-raise.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
instructions: Stand tall with feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell at each side, palms facing in.
Brace your core and keep a slight bend in your elbows.
Raise the dumbbells out to the sides until they reach shoulder height.
Lower them back to your sides under control.

incline-dumbbell-curl.name: Seated Incline Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Sit back on a 45-60 degree incline bench holding a dumbbell in each hand, arms hanging straight, palms facing in.
Keep your upper arms roughly fixed as you curl the dumbbells up.
Rotate your palms up as you lift so they face your shoulders at the top.
Lower the dumbbells under control back to the stretched starting position.

cable-tricep-pushdown.name: Cable Tricep Extension
instructions: Set a cable pulley high with a bar or rope attachment and grip it with elbows bent at your sides.
Brace your core and keep your shoulders back and elbows pinned.
Extend your elbows to push the attachment down until your arms are straight.
Return to the start under control without letting the elbows flare.

front-squat.name: Front Squat
instructions: Rack the bar across the front of your shoulders in a front-rack or cross-arm hold with elbows high.
Unrack and set your feet just outside shoulder width, slightly turned out.
Brace your core and descend by sitting the hips back, keeping the torso upright.
Track knees over toes to a deep squat, then drive back up to standing.

barbell-lunge.name: Barbell Lunge
instructions: Rest a barbell on your upper back and set your feet hip-width apart.
Step forward with one leg, planting the heel and lifting the back heel.
Keeping an upright torso, lower the back knee toward the floor with the front heel down.
Push through the front foot to return to standing, then repeat on the other side.

leg-extension.name: Leg Extension
instructions: Sit in the leg extension machine with the pad resting on the front of your lower legs.
Set your knees bent to about 90 degrees with your back against the pad.
Extend your legs upward until they are straight in line with your thighs.
Lower under control back to the start.

seated-machine-calf-press.name: Seated Calf Raise
instructions: Sit at the calf machine with the balls of your feet on the platform and the pad over your knees.
Release the safety and let your heels drop for a stretch.
Press through the balls of your feet to raise your heels as high as possible.
Lower under control back to the stretched position.

calf-press.name: Calf Press
instructions: Sit in a leg press with the balls of your feet on the lower edge of the platform and legs nearly straight.
Release the safeties and let your toes flex back for a stretch.
Press the platform away by pushing through the balls of your feet.
Return under control to the stretched starting position.

dumbbell-bench-press.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie flat on a bench holding a dumbbell in each hand at chest level, palms forward.
Brace your core and press the dumbbells up until your arms are extended over your shoulders.
Lower under control to chest level with elbows about 45 degrees from your torso.
Press back to the start.

smith-machine-bench-press.name: Smith Machine Bench Press
instructions: Lie on a flat bench positioned under the Smith machine bar so the bar lines up with your mid-chest.
Grip just outside shoulder width and rotate the bar to unrack it.
Lower the bar to your chest under control, elbows about 45 degrees from your torso.
Press back up and re-rack at the end of the set.

hammerstrength-chest-press.name: Hammer Strength Chest Press
instructions: Sit in the chest press machine with your back against the pad and handles at chest level.
Grip the handles and brace your core.
Press the handles forward until your arms are extended.
Return under control to the start.

pull-up.name: Pull Up
instructions: Hang from a bar with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder width.
Brace your core and pull your shoulder blades down.
Pull yourself up until your chin clears the bar.
Lower under control to a full hang.

v-bar-pulldown.name: V-Bar Pulldown
instructions: Attach a V-bar to the pulldown cable and grip it with palms facing each other.
Sit with knees under the pad and brace your core.
Pull the handle to your upper chest, leaning back slightly and squeezing your back.
Extend your arms back to the start under control.

dumbbell-shoulder-press.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Sit or stand holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height, palms forward.
Brace your core and keep your torso upright.
Press the dumbbells overhead until your arms are extended.
Lower under control back to shoulder height.

seated-barbell-shoulder-press.name: Seated Barbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Sit on an upright bench with a barbell racked at shoulder height.
Grip just outside shoulder width and unrack the bar to the front of your shoulders.
Brace your core and press the bar overhead to lockout.
Lower under control back to your shoulders.

dumbbell-front-raise.name: Dumbbell Front Raise
instructions: Stand tall holding a dumbbell in each hand in front of your thighs, palms facing you.
Keep a slight bend in your elbows and brace your core.
Raise the dumbbells forward up to shoulder height.
Lower under control back to the start.

dumbbell-bicep-curl.name: Dumbbell Bicep Curl
instructions: Stand tall holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides, palms facing forward.
Keep your elbows pinned at your sides and brace your core.
Curl the dumbbells up to shoulder height.
Lower under control back to the start.

ez-bar-curl.name: EZ-Bar Curl
instructions: Stand holding an EZ bar at the angled grips with palms facing up and forward.
Keep elbows at your sides and brace your core.
Curl the bar to shoulder height without swinging.
Lower under control to the start.

hammer-curls.name: Hammer Curls
instructions: Stand tall holding a dumbbell in each hand with palms facing your body (neutral grip).
Keep elbows at your sides and brace your core.
Curl the dumbbells up while keeping the neutral grip.
Lower under control back to the start.

dumbbell-skullcrusher.name: Dumbbell Skullcrusher
instructions: Lie on a flat bench holding a dumbbell in each hand over your shoulders, palms facing in.
Keep your upper arms vertical and stationary.
Bend at the elbows to lower the dumbbells beside your head.
Extend your elbows to press the dumbbells back up.

seated-tricep-press.name: Seated Tricep Press
instructions: Sit upright holding a dumbbell with both hands overhead, arms extended.
Brace your core and keep your upper arms close to your head.
Bend your elbows to lower the dumbbell behind your head.
Extend your elbows to press the dumbbell back overhead.

cable-rope-tricep-extension.name: Cable Rope Tricep Extension
instructions: Set a high pulley with a rope attachment and grip an end in each hand, elbows at your sides.
Brace your core and keep your elbows pinned.
Extend your elbows to push the rope down, spreading the ends apart at the bottom.
Return under control to the start.

hack-squat.name: Hack Squat
instructions: Position yourself in the hack squat machine with shoulders under the pads and feet shoulder-width on the platform.
Release the safeties and brace your core.
Lower into a squat by bending your knees, tracking them over your toes.
Drive through your feet to press back up.

dumbbell-romanian-deadlift.name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Stand tall holding a dumbbell in each hand in front of your thighs.
Keep a soft bend in your knees and a flat back.
Hinge at the hips, pushing them back to lower the dumbbells along your legs.
Lower until you feel a hamstring stretch, then drive your hips forward to stand tall.

romanian-deadlift.name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Stand holding a barbell at hip height with a flat back and soft knees.
Hinge at the hips, pushing them back to lower the bar along your legs.
Keep the bar close to your body and lower until you feel a hamstring stretch.
Drive your hips forward to return to standing.

trap-bar-deadlift.name: Trap Bar Deadlift
instructions: Stand inside a loaded trap bar with feet shoulder-width apart.
Hinge and bend to grip the side handles with a flat back and braced core.
Drive through the floor, extending hips and knees together to stand tall.
Return the bar to the floor under control.

machine-leg-press.name: Machine Leg Press
instructions: Sit in the leg press machine with your back against the pad and feet shoulder-width on the platform.
Release the safeties and brace your core.
Lower the platform by bending your knees while keeping your back flat.
Press back up without aggressively locking the knees.

lying-hamstrings-curl.name: Lying Hamstrings Curl
instructions: Lie face down on the leg curl machine with the pad against the back of your ankles.
Grip the handles and brace your core.
Curl your heels toward your glutes by bending your knees.
Lower under control back to the start.

standing-leg-curl.name: Standing Leg Curl
instructions: Stand at the machine with one ankle behind the pad and torso supported.
Brace your core and keep your hips still.
Curl your heel up toward your glute by bending the knee.
Lower under control and repeat, then switch legs.

standing-dumbbell-calf-raise.name: Standing Dumbbell Calf Raise
instructions: Stand tall holding a dumbbell in each hand, balls of your feet on a slightly raised surface if available.
Brace your core and let your heels drop for a stretch.
Push through the balls of your feet to raise your heels as high as possible.
Lower under control to the stretched position.

machine-fly.name: Machine Fly
instructions: Sit in the pec deck with your back against the pad and forearms or handles at chest level.
Brace your core and keep a slight bend in your arms.
Bring the handles together in front of your chest by squeezing your chest.
Return under control to the stretched position.

cable-crossover-fly.name: Cable Crossover Fly
instructions: Set both cable pulleys high and grip a handle in each hand, stepping forward into a split stance.
Keep a slight bend in your elbows and brace your core.
Bring the handles down and together in front of your hips by squeezing your chest.
Return under control to the stretched position.

machine-row.name: Machine Row
instructions: Sit at the row machine with your chest against the pad and grip the handles.
Brace your core and keep your back flat.
Pull the handles toward your torso, driving your elbows back.
Squeeze your shoulder blades, then return under control.

dumbbell-bent-over-row.name: Dumbbell Bent Over Row
instructions: Hold a dumbbell in each hand and hinge forward at the hips with a flat back.
Let the dumbbells hang with palms facing your body.
Row both dumbbells to your lower ribs, driving your elbows back.
Lower under control and repeat.

cable-lateral-raise.name: Cable Lateral Raise
instructions: Set a low pulley and grip the handle with the hand farthest from the machine.
Stand side-on with a slight bend in your elbow and brace your core.
Raise your arm out to the side up to shoulder height.
Lower under control back to the start.

machine-lateral-raise.name: Machine Lateral Raise
instructions: Sit in the lateral raise machine with the pads against the outside of your upper arms.
Brace your core and keep your torso upright.
Raise your arms out to the sides up to shoulder height.
Lower under control back to the start.

cable-bicep-curl.name: Cable Bicep Curl
instructions: Set a cable pulley low with a bar or rope and grip it with palms up.
Stand tall with elbows at your sides and brace your core.
Curl the attachment up to shoulder height.
Lower under control while keeping tension on the cable.

single-leg-leg-extension.name: Single Leg Leg Extension
instructions: Sit in the leg extension machine with the pad on the front of one lower leg.
Brace your core and keep your back against the pad.
Extend the working leg until it is straight in line with your thigh.
Lower under control, then complete the set and switch legs.

dumbbell-squat.name: Dumbbell Squat
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides (or one at your chest).
Brace your core and sit your hips back to descend into a squat.
Track your knees over your toes and keep your chest up to at least parallel.
Drive back up to standing.

dumbbell-lunge.name: Dumbbell Lunge
instructions: Stand tall holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides.
Step forward with one leg, planting the heel and lifting the back heel.
Lower the back knee toward the floor while keeping an upright torso.
Push through the front foot to return to standing, then alternate legs.

standing-barbell-calf-raise.name: Standing Barbell Calf Raise
instructions: Rest a barbell across your upper back and stand with feet hip-width apart.
Brace your core and keep your legs straight.
Push through the balls of your feet to raise your heels as high as possible.
Lower your heels under control.

upright-row.name: Upright Row
instructions: Stand tall holding a barbell at thigh height with a shoulder-width overhand grip and arms extended.
Keep the bar close to your body and pull your elbows up toward the ceiling.
Maintain a neutral spine and avoid shrugging with momentum.
Raise until the bar reaches chest height, then lower under control.

ab-rollout.name: Ab Wheel Roll Out
instructions: Kneel tall with an ab wheel on the floor in front of you.
Hinge forward to grip the handles with arms extended and a slight bend in the elbows.
Brace your core and roll the wheel forward, keeping your spine neutral.
Extend as far as you can while maintaining a straight line from knees to shoulders.
Pull the wheel back to the starting position under control.

inverted-row.name: Inverted Row
instructions: Set a bar at waist height and lie underneath it with a double-overhand grip just outside shoulder width.
Extend your legs and brace your core so your body forms a straight line from heels to shoulders.
Pull your chest to the bar, driving elbows back at about 45 degrees from your torso.
Lightly touch the bar, then lower under control to full arm extension.

dip.name: Dip
instructions: Grip parallel dip bars with arms extended and suspend your body above the floor.
Brace your core, angle your torso slightly forward, and keep your shoulders back.
Bend your elbows to lower until they reach about 90 degrees, keeping elbows close to your body.
Press back up to full arm extension.

barbell-shrug.name: Barbell Shrug
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart holding a barbell at thigh height with an overhand grip.
Brace your core and keep your chest up with shoulders pulled back.
Elevate your shoulders straight up toward your ears without bending your elbows.
Pause briefly at the top, then lower your shoulders under control.

plank.name: Plank
instructions: Lie face down and position your elbows directly under your shoulders with forearms parallel.
Tuck your toes under and brace your core before lifting your hips and knees off the floor.
Maintain a straight line from heels through hips to shoulders.
Hold the position for the prescribed time without letting your hips sag or pike up.

arnold-dumbbell-press.name: Seated Arnold Press
instructions: Sit upright on a bench with dumbbells at shoulder height, palms facing your body.
Keep your elbows at your sides and shoulders back as you begin pressing overhead.
Rotate your palms to face forward as you extend your arms to lockout over your ears.
Reverse the rotation as you lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.

dumbbell-shrug.name: Dumbbell Shrug
instructions: Stand tall with a dumbbell in each hand at your sides, palms facing in.
Brace your core and keep your neck neutral with shoulders back.
Shrug your shoulders straight up toward your ears without bending your elbows.
Lower under control back to the start.

dumbbell-upright-row.name: Dumbbell Upright Row
instructions: Stand holding dumbbells in front of your hips with palms facing your body.
Pull the dumbbells up along your torso by driving your elbows toward the ceiling.
Keep a neutral spine and avoid using momentum.
Raise to chest height, then lower under control.

cable-upright-row.name: Cable Upright Row
instructions: Attach a straight bar to a low cable pulley and grip it with an overhand grip.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart and pull the bar toward your chest.
Lead with your elbows, keeping the bar close to your body.
Lower under control and repeat.

bench-dip.name: Bench Dip
instructions: Sit on the edge of a bench with hands beside your hips gripping the bench.
Walk your feet forward and support your weight on your arms with legs extended.
Lower your hips by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body.
Descend until your upper arms are parallel to the floor, then press back up.

assisted-dip.name: Assisted Dip
instructions: Grip the dip bars and place your knees on the assistance pad.
Brace your core and suspend your body with a slight forward lean.
Lower by bending your elbows to about 90 degrees with elbows tucked.
Press back up to full extension under control.

machine-tricep-dip.name: Machine Tricep Dip
instructions: Sit in the tricep dip machine with your back against the pad.
Grip the handles with elbows bent to about 90 degrees and tucked at your sides.
Extend your arms to press the handles down to lockout.
Return under control to the starting position.

crunches.name: Crunches
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Place your hands behind your head and keep your lower back pressed to the floor.
Curl your shoulder blades off the ground by contracting your abs.
Lower under control while maintaining tension in your core.

ab-crunch-machine.name: Ab Crunch Machine
instructions: Sit in the ab crunch machine with feet secured and shoulder pads in place.
Grip the handles overhead and brace your core.
Crunch forward by pulling your ribcage toward your hips against the resistance.
Return under control to the stretched starting position.

russian-twist.name: Russian Twist
instructions: Sit with knees bent and feet elevated, leaning your torso back to about 45 degrees.
Clasp your hands at your chest and brace your core.
Rotate your shoulders to one side, bringing your hands toward the floor beside your hip.
Twist to the opposite side under control and repeat.

leg-raise.name: Leg Raise
instructions: Lie flat on your back with legs extended and arms at your sides.
Press your lower back into the floor and brace your core.
Raise your legs to vertical while keeping a slight knee bend.
Lower your legs under control without arching your lower back.

standing-dumbbell-shoulder-press.name: Standing Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart holding dumbbells at shoulder height.
Brace your core and keep your torso upright.
Press the dumbbells overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Lower under control back to shoulder height.

close-grip-bench-press.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
instructions: Lie on a flat bench with shoulder blades pulled together and feet planted on the floor.
Grip the bar just inside shoulder width and unrack it with arms extended over your chest.
Brace your core and lower the bar to your chest, keeping elbows tucked close to your torso.
Lightly touch your chest, then press the bar back to the starting position.

back-extensions.name: Back Extensions
instructions: Position yourself face down on a back extension bench with your thighs on the pad and ankles secured.
Cross your arms over your chest or hold a weight plate at your chest for added resistance.
Hinge at the hips to lower your torso toward the floor under control.
Drive through your lower back, glutes, and hamstrings to raise your torso until your body forms a straight line.
Pause briefly at the top, then lower and repeat.

cable-crunch.name: Cable Crunch
instructions: Attach a rope to a high cable pulley and kneel facing the machine.
Hold the rope behind your head with elbows bent at your sides.
Hinge at the hips to lower your torso until nearly parallel to the floor.
Crunch your ribcage toward your pelvis by contracting your abs.
Return under control to the starting position.

seated-back-extension.name: Seated Back Extension
instructions: Sit upright in a back extension machine with feet on the footrests.
Position the pad just below your shoulder blades and grip the handles.
Brace your core and extend your hips to lower the pad in a controlled arc.
Drive back up until your torso aligns with your thighs, then repeat.

superman.name: Superman
instructions: Lie face down with arms extended overhead and legs straight.
Brace your core and simultaneously lift your arms and legs a few inches off the floor.
Squeeze your glutes and lower back at the top of the movement.
Lower under control back to the starting position.

incline-back-extension.name: Incline Back Extension
instructions: Adjust an incline back extension bench so your hips sit just above the pad edge.
Secure your lower body and hinge forward to lower your torso into the start position.
Engage your glutes, hamstrings, and lower back to raise your torso in line with your hips.
Pause at the top without hyperextending, then lower under control.

sit-up.name: Sit Up
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet anchored under a stable object or held by a partner.
Hold a weight plate at your chest or behind your head for added resistance if desired.
Brace your core and curl your torso up until you reach a seated position.
Lower under control back to the floor, keeping tension in your abs throughout the set.

t-bar-row.name: T-Bar Row
instructions: Load a T-bar row machine with your desired weight and stand with feet on either side of the bar.
Grab the handles with palms facing down and brace your core.
Pull the weight toward your upper stomach, driving your elbows back close to your torso.
Lower the bar under control back to the starting position.

preacher-curl.name: Preacher Curl
instructions: Sit upright in the preacher curl bench with your chest pressed against the pad.
Extend your arms over the pad and grasp the EZ-bar with an underhand grip.
Curl the bar toward your shoulders while keeping your upper arms in contact with the pad.
Lower under control, stopping before your elbows fully lock out to maintain tension.

machine-preacher-curl.name: Machine Preacher Curl
instructions: Sit upright in the preacher curl machine with your chest pressed against the pad.
Extend your arms over the pad and grasp the handles with an underhand grip.
Curl the handles toward your shoulders while keeping your upper arms on the pad.
Lower under control back to the starting position without fully locking your elbows.

cross-body-hammer-curls.name: Cross Body Hammer Curls
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart holding a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing in.
Keep your elbow pinned at your side and curl one dumbbell in an arc toward the opposite shoulder.
Squeeze at the top, then lower under control while maintaining tension in the bicep.
Alternate arms for each rep, keeping your torso still throughout the set.

cable-rope-hammer-curls.name: Cable Rope Hammer Curls
instructions: Set a cable pulley to the lowest position and attach a rope handle.
Grip each end of the rope with palms facing each other and step back from the machine.
Brace your core and curl the rope toward your chest, keeping elbows at your sides.
Lower under control to the start while maintaining constant tension on the cable.

bicycle-crunch.name: Bicycle Crunch
instructions: Lie on your back with hands behind your head and hips and knees bent to 90 degrees.
Extend one leg away from your body while keeping both feet off the ground.
Bring that leg back in and rotate your torso to touch the opposite elbow to the raised knee.
Return to the start and alternate sides, keeping your core engaged throughout.

hammerstrength-incline-chest-press.name: Hammerstrength Incline Chest Press
instructions: Sit in the incline Hammerstrength press with your back flat against the pad and feet planted.
Grip the handles at upper-chest height with an overhand grip just outside shoulder width.
Brace your core and press the handles forward until your arms are extended.
Return under control to the starting position without letting your shoulders leave the pad.

assisted-pull-up.name: Assisted Pull Up
instructions: Kneel on the assisted pull-up pad and grip the bar with palms facing away.
Brace your core to keep a straight line from shoulders to knees.
Pull your chest to the bar by driving your elbows down toward your ribs.
Lower under control to full arm extension.

standing-machine-calf-press.name: Standing Machine Calf Press
instructions: Stand at the calf press machine with the balls of your feet on the platform and shoulders under the pads.
Brace your core and let your heels drop for a stretch at the bottom.
Press through the balls of your feet to raise your heels as high as possible.
Lower under control back to the stretched position.

glute-ham-raise.name: Glute Ham Raise
instructions: Position yourself on a glute-ham developer with your hips just over the pad and feet secured under the foot pads.
Fold your arms across your chest and brace your core to keep your spine neutral.
Lower your torso forward with control by bending at the hips and knees.
Drive through your hamstrings and glutes to raise your torso until your body forms a straight line from heels to shoulders.
Lower under control and repeat.

farmer-s-carry.name: Farmer's Carry
instructions: Stand between a pair of heavy handles or dumbbells with feet shoulder-width apart.
Hinge at the hips, grip the handles with a neutral grip, and stand tall with a braced core.
Walk forward with short, controlled steps while keeping your shoulders level and hips stable.
Maintain an upright posture for the prescribed distance or time.
Set the weights down under control at the end of the carry.

farmer-s-walk.name: Farmer's Walk
instructions: Stand tall holding a heavy implement in each hand at your sides with a neutral grip.
Brace your core and pull your shoulder blades back before you start walking.
Take short, steady steps while keeping your torso upright and shoulders level.
Walk for the prescribed distance without letting the weights drift away from your body.
Lower the weights under control when you finish the set.

single-arm-farmer-walk.name: Single Arm Farmer Walk
instructions: Stand tall holding a heavy dumbbell in one hand at your side.
Brace your core hard to resist leaning toward the loaded side.
Walk forward with controlled steps while keeping your shoulders square.
Complete the prescribed distance, then switch hands and repeat.

reverse-lunge.name: Dumbbell Reverse Lunge
instructions: Stand tall holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides with feet hip-width apart.
Step backward with one leg and lower until both knees reach about 90 degrees.
Keep your torso upright and your front heel planted on the floor.
Push through the front foot to return to standing, then alternate legs.

barbell-hip-thrust.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
instructions: Sit on the floor with your upper back against a bench and a padded barbell across your hips.
Plant your feet flat about hip-width apart with knees bent.
Brace your core and drive through your heels to extend your hips until your torso is parallel to the floor.
Squeeze your glutes at the top without over-arching your lower back.
Lower your hips under control and repeat.

dumbbell-hip-thrust.name: Dumbbell Hip Thrust
instructions: Sit on the floor with your upper back against a bench and a dumbbell resting on your hips.
Set your feet flat about hip-width apart with knees bent.
Brace your core and drive through your heels to raise your hips to bench height.
Pause at the top with glutes engaged, then lower under control.

dumbbell-glute-bridge.name: Dumbbell Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie face up on the floor with your feet flat about shoulder-width apart.
Hold a dumbbell on your hips with both hands.
Drive through your heels and squeeze your glutes to raise your hips until aligned with knees and shoulders.
Pause at the top, then lower under control.

glute-kickback-machine.name: Glute Kickback Machine
instructions: Position yourself on the glute kickback machine with your chest against the pad.
Place one foot on the platform behind you with a slight bend in the knee.
Brace your core and extend your hip to press the platform back.
Squeeze your glute at the end range, then return under control.
Complete all reps on one side before switching legs.

barbell-decline-bench-press.name: Decline Bench Press
instructions: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and shoulder blades pulled together.
Grip the bar just outside shoulder width and unrack it over your lower chest.
Brace your core and lower the bar to your chest with elbows about 45 degrees from your torso.
Press the bar back up to the starting position under control.

dumbbell-decline-bench-press.name: Dumbbell Decline Bench Press
instructions: Lie on a decline bench holding a dumbbell in each hand at chest level.
Brace your core and press the dumbbells up until your arms are extended over your lower chest.
Lower under control with elbows about 45 degrees from your torso.
Press back to the start without bouncing at the bottom.

cable-face-pull.name: Cable Face Pull
instructions: Set a cable pulley to upper-chest height with a rope attachment.
Grip the rope with thumbs toward you and step back to create tension.
Pull the rope toward your face, separating your hands as your elbows flare out and back.
Squeeze your rear delts and upper back at the end of the pull.
Return under control to the starting position.

incline-barbell-skull-crusher.name: Incline Skullcrusher
instructions: Set an incline bench to about 30-45 degrees and lie back holding a barbell or EZ bar over your shoulders.
Keep your upper arms angled slightly back and fixed in place.
Bend at the elbows to lower the bar behind your head in a controlled arc.
Extend your elbows to press the bar back to the starting position.

dumbbell-goblet-squat.name: Goblet Squat
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart holding one dumbbell vertically against your chest.
Brace your core and sit your hips back and down into a squat.
Keep your chest up and elbows inside your knees at the bottom.
Drive through your feet to return to standing.

kettlebell-single-arm-farmer-walk.name: Kettlebell Single Arm Farmer Walk
instructions: Stand tall holding a kettlebell in one hand at your side with a neutral grip.
Brace your core to keep your torso upright and hips level.
Walk forward with short, controlled steps for the prescribed distance or time.
Switch hands and repeat on the other side.

dumbbell-bulgarian-split-squat.name: Dumbbell Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Stand in a split stance with the top of your rear foot resting on a bench behind you.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand at your sides and brace your core.
Lower your back knee toward the floor while keeping your front shin relatively vertical.
Drive through your front foot to return to the starting position, then complete all reps before switching legs.

cable-hip-extension.name: Cable Hip Extension
instructions: Attach an ankle cuff to a low cable pulley and secure it around one ankle.
Face the machine, hold the frame for balance, and brace your core.
Extend your working leg straight back by squeezing your glute, keeping your hips square.
Return under control and repeat for all reps before switching legs.

dumbbell-rear-delt-raise.name: Dumbbell Rear Delt Raise
instructions: Hinge forward at the hips with a flat back, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Let your arms hang beneath your shoulders with a slight bend in your elbows.
Raise the dumbbells out to the sides until they reach shoulder height.
Lower under control back to the start.

single-arm-dumbbell-tricep-extension.name: Single Arm Dumbbell Tricep Extension
instructions: Stand or sit holding a dumbbell overhead with one arm fully extended.
Keep your upper arm close to your head and brace your core.
Bend at the elbow to lower the dumbbell behind your head under control.
Extend your elbow to press the dumbbell back overhead, then repeat for all reps before switching arms.

tricep-push-up.name: Tricep Push Up
instructions: Set up in a push-up position with your hands close together so your thumbs and index fingers nearly touch.
Brace your core and keep your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Lower your chest toward your hands by bending your elbows and keeping them tucked close to your sides.
Press through your palms to extend your arms and return to the start.

cable-pull-through.name: Cable Pull Through
instructions: Attach a rope to the lowest pulley setting and stand facing away from the machine, gripping the rope ends with palms facing in.
Step forward one to two feet with feet wider than shoulder width and let the rope rest at hip height.
Brace your core and hinge at the hips, keeping a neutral spine and slight knee bend, until you feel tension in your hamstrings.
Drive your hips forward to stand tall, pulling the rope through your legs and squeezing your glutes at the top.
Return under control to the hinged position and repeat.

split-squat.name: Split Squat
instructions: Set up in a split stance with your front foot on a low platform or weight plate and your rear foot flat on the floor.
Hold dumbbells at your sides or position a barbell across your upper back if using a bar.
Brace your core and keep your torso upright as you lower until your rear knee hovers just above the floor.
Aim for roughly 90-degree bends at both knees with your front knee tracking over your mid-foot.
Drive through your front heel to extend your hips and knees back to the start, then repeat all reps before switching legs.

chin-up.name: Chin Up
instructions: Hang from a bar with an underhand grip and hands about shoulder-width apart.
Brace your core and pull your shoulder blades down before initiating the pull.
Drive your elbows down and back to lift your chest toward the bar.
Pause briefly when your chin clears the bar, then lower under control to a full hang.

good-morning.name: Good Morning
instructions: Set the bar just below shoulder height and grip it with an overhand grip just outside shoulder width.
Pinch your shoulder blades together, brace your core, and position the bar across the base of your neck.
Unrack and step back with feet shoulder-width apart.
Hinge at the hips with a slight knee bend, keeping your spine neutral as you lower your torso forward.
Stop when your torso is near parallel to the floor, then drive your hips forward to stand tall.

hanging-leg-raise.name: Hanging Leg Raise
instructions: Hang from a pull-up bar with an overhand or neutral grip and arms fully extended.
Brace your abs and keep your torso stable without swinging.
Raise your legs by flexing at the hips until your thighs reach roughly 90 degrees.
Lower your legs under control back to the starting position without losing tension in your core.

machine-reverse-fly.name: Machine Reverse Fly
instructions: Sit facing the reverse fly machine with the seat adjusted so the handles are at shoulder height.
Grip the handles with arms extended in front of you and brace your core.
Pull the handles apart in a wide arc until your arms are in line with your shoulders.
Squeeze your rear delts at the end range, then return under control to the start.

cable-rear-delt-fly.name: Cable Rear Delt Fly
instructions: Set both pulleys slightly above eye level and stand facing the machine.
Cross your arms to grab the left handle with your right hand and the right handle with your left hand.
Stand tall with feet shoulder-width apart and brace your core.
Pull your arms out and back in a wide arc, keeping elbows nearly straight, until you feel a squeeze in your rear delts.
Return under control to the starting position.

snatch-grip-deadlift.name: Snatch-Grip Deadlift
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart and a loaded barbell an inch from your shins.
Hinge at the hips and bend your knees to reach the bar with a wide double-overhand grip.
Set your back flat, chest up, and shoulders over or slightly ahead of the bar.
Drive through the floor, extending hips and knees together to pull the bar in a straight path up your legs.
Stand tall at lockout, then reverse the motion under control to lower the bar.

reverse-hyperextension.name: Reverse Hyperextension
instructions: Lie face down on a reverse hyper bench with your hips at the edge of the pad and legs hanging straight behind you.
Grip the handles in front of you and brace your core to keep your spine neutral.
Raise your legs by extending your hips until they align with your torso.
Squeeze your glutes at the top without overarching your lower back.
Lower your legs under control back to the start.

incline-dumbbell-row.name: Incline Dumbbell Row
instructions: Set an incline bench to about 45 degrees and lie chest-down with your feet planted for stability.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with arms hanging straight down and palms facing in.
Brace your core and pull the dumbbells toward your lower rib cage, driving your elbows back.
Squeeze your back at the top, then lower the weights under control to full extension.

behind-the-neck-push-press.name: Behind the Neck Push Press
instructions: Sit upright on a bench with feet flat on the floor and the bar resting across the base of your neck.
Grip the bar with an overhand grip just outside shoulder width and brace your core.
Press the bar straight overhead without using leg drive until your arms are fully extended.
Pause briefly with the bar aligned over your ears, then lower under control to the base of your neck.

push-press.name: Push Press
instructions: Rack a barbell at shoulder height and grip it shoulder-width with the bar on your front shoulders.
Unrack and stand with feet shoulder-width apart, core braced.
Dip slightly by bending your knees and hips, then drive explosively through your legs.
Use the leg drive to help press the bar overhead to full lockout.
Lower the bar back to your shoulders under control.

vertical-leg-raise.name: Vertical Leg Raise
instructions: Position yourself on a vertical knee raise station with your back against the pad and forearms on the supports.
Brace your core and keep your shoulders engaged so you do not slide down.
Raise your straight legs in front of you by folding at the hips until they reach roughly parallel to the floor.
Pause briefly at the top, then lower your legs under control without swinging.

vertical-knee-raise.name: Vertical Knee Raise
instructions: Stand on the foot pads of a vertical knee raise station and press your back into the pad.
Grip the handles and suspend your body with arms extended, keeping your core braced.
Raise your knees toward your chest by flexing at the hips and abs without swinging.
Lower your legs under control back to the starting position while maintaining core tension.

dumbbell-pull-over.name: Dumbbell Pull Over
instructions: Hold one dumbbell vertically in both hands with a diamond grip.
Lie on a flat bench with your upper back supported and feet flat on the floor.
Extend your arms over your chest with a slight bend in your elbows.
Lower the dumbbell in a wide arc behind your head until your upper arms are near parallel to the floor.
Pull the weight back over your chest by engaging your chest, lats, and shoulders.

dumbbell-incline-fly.name: Dumbbell Incline Fly
instructions: Set an incline bench to 45–60 degrees and lie back with your shoulder blades retracted.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand above your shoulders with palms facing in and elbows slightly bent.
Brace your core and lower the dumbbells out to your sides in a wide arc.
Stop when the dumbbells reach chest height while keeping a soft bend in your elbows.
Squeeze your chest to bring the dumbbells back together over your shoulders.

walking-lunge.name: Walking Lunge
instructions: Stand tall with feet hip-width apart and arms at your sides.
Step forward with one leg, landing heel first with your back heel lifted.
Lower your back knee toward the floor while keeping your torso upright and front heel planted.
Drive through your front foot to stand and bring your back leg forward into the next step.
Continue alternating legs as you walk forward.

lunge.name: Lunge
instructions: Stand tall with feet hip-width apart.
Step forward with one leg and lower your back knee toward the floor.
Keep your front knee tracking over your foot and your torso upright.
Press through your front foot to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired reps, then switch legs.

air-squats.name: Air Squats
instructions: Stand with feet just outside shoulder width and toes turned out slightly.
Brace your core and sit your hips back and down into a squat.
Keep your chest up and knees tracking over your toes.
Descend until your thighs are parallel or as deep as you can with a neutral spine.
Drive through your feet to return to standing.

dumbbell-stiff-legged-deadlift.name: Dumbbell Stiff Legged Deadlift
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, dumbbells in front of your thighs.
Hinge at your hips and lower the dumbbells along your legs with only a slight knee bend.
Keep your back flat and shoulders pulled back as you reach toward the floor.
Feel a stretch in your hamstrings, then drive your hips forward to stand tall.
Squeeze your glutes at the top without hyperextending your lower back.

oblique-crunch.name: Oblique Crunch
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Place one hand behind your head and extend the other arm across your torso.
Curl your shoulder toward the opposite knee, lifting your shoulder blades off the floor.
Focus on rotating through your torso to target the obliques.
Lower under control and complete all reps on one side before switching.

jump-squat.name: Jump Squat
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart and toes turned out slightly.
Lower into a squat by sitting your hips back while keeping your chest up.
Descend until your thighs are parallel to the floor with knees tracking over your toes.
Explode upward by extending your hips and knees to jump off the ground.
Land softly with bent knees and hips to absorb the impact, then go directly into the next rep.

single-leg-kickback.name: Single Leg Kickback
instructions: Get on all fours with hands under shoulders and knees under hips at 90 degrees.
Brace your core to keep your spine neutral and hips level.
Keeping your knee bent at 90 degrees, lift one leg until your thigh is in line with your torso.
Squeeze your glute at the top without rotating your hips.
Lower under control and repeat for all reps before switching legs.

hanging-oblique-knee-raise.name: Hanging Oblique Knee Raise
instructions: Hang from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip and let your legs hang straight.
Brace your core and keep your shoulders packed down.
Raise your knees toward one side of your torso by twisting slightly through your waist.
Lower your legs under control back to the start.
Repeat, alternating the side you bring your knees toward each rep.

hanging-knee-raise.name: Hanging Knee Raise
instructions: Hang from a chin-up bar with a neutral or overhand grip and arms fully extended.
Brace your abs by breathing into your stomach and tightening your core.
Raise your knees toward your chest while keeping your torso still.
Pause briefly at the top, then lower your knees under control to the start.

dumbbell-walking-lunge.name: Dumbbell Walking Lunge
instructions: Hold a dumbbell in each hand at your sides with feet hip-width apart.
Take a long step forward and lower your back knee toward the floor.
Keep your front knee bent to about 90 degrees and your torso upright.
Drive through your front foot to stand and step the back leg forward.
Continue walking forward, alternating legs with each step.

machine-shoulder-press.name: Machine Shoulder Press
instructions: Sit upright in a shoulder press machine with shoulder blades squeezed together and heels planted on the floor.
Keep your head, shoulders, and glutes against the back pad throughout the set.
Grip the handles with an overhand grip just outside shoulder width.
Brace your core and press through your palms to extend your elbows overhead.
Lower under control back to the starting position.

hammerstrength-shoulder-press.name: Hammerstrength Shoulder Press
instructions: Sit upright in a Hammerstrength shoulder press with shoulder blades against the pad and feet flat on the floor.
Grip the handles with an overhand grip just outside shoulder width.
Brace your core and press the handles overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Lower under control back to shoulder height.

dumbbell-hanging-lateral-raise.name: Dumbbell Hanging Lateral Raise
instructions: Stand perpendicular to a cable pole and hold the cable with your inside arm for support.
Hang a dumbbell at hip height with your outside arm while leaning slightly away from the pole.
Raise the dumbbell out to the side in an arc until it reaches just above shoulder height with a straight arm.
Lower under control and repeat, then switch sides.

dumbbell-shoulder-raise.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Raise
instructions: Stand upright with feet shoulder-width apart and dumbbells at your sides, palms facing in.
Brace your core and keep your back straight.
Raise the dumbbells out to the sides with a slight upward rotation until they reach shoulder height.
Lower under control back to the starting position.

push-up.name: Push Up
instructions: Start in a high plank with hands on the floor just outside shoulder width and elbows fully extended.
Brace your core to keep a straight line from heels to shoulders.
Lower your chest toward the floor by bending your elbows at about 45 degrees from your torso.
Press back up to the starting position after your chest reaches the floor.

wide-grip-lat-pulldown.name: Wide Grip Lat Pulldown
instructions: Attach a wide bar to the pulldown cable and grip it outside shoulder width with palms facing forward.
Sit with knees under the pad and brace your core.
Pull the bar to the back of your ribcage, leaning back slightly and squeezing your back.
Extend your arms back to the starting position under control.

concentration-curl.name: Concentration Curl
instructions: Sit on the edge of a bench with knees bent and feet flat outside shoulder width.
Extend one arm between your legs and brace your elbow against the inside of your thigh.
Curl the dumbbell toward your shoulder while keeping your upper arm fixed against your leg.
Lower under control back to the starting position and repeat, then switch arms.

dumbbell-kickbacks.name: Dumbbell Kickbacks
instructions: Hold a dumbbell in each hand and stand with feet hip-width apart and a slight knee bend.
Hinge at the hips until your torso is angled forward about 45 degrees with a flat back.
Position your upper arms behind you with elbows bent and dumbbells below your elbows.
Extend your elbows to straighten your arms behind you, squeezing your triceps at the top.
Lower under control back to the starting position.

standing-hip-adduction.name: Standing Hip Adduction
instructions: Stand upright with feet together and hands on your hips for balance.
Raise one leg across your body in front of the standing leg, keeping the leg fairly straight.
Return under control to the starting position and repeat, then switch sides.

side-leg-raises.name: Side Leg Raises
instructions: Lie on your side with legs extended and feet stacked.
Rest your head on your bottom arm and brace your core.
Raise your top leg vertically to about a 45-degree angle while keeping it straight.
Lower under control and repeat, then switch sides.

dumbbell-side-bend.name: Dumbbell Side Bend
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart holding a dumbbell in one hand at your side.
Place your free hand on your hip and brace your core.
Slowly lower the dumbbell down the side of your leg by bending sideways at the waist.
Return to upright under control and repeat, then switch sides.

machine-hip-adductor.name: Machine Hip Adductor
instructions: Sit in the thigh adductor machine with your back against the pad.
Place your feet on the pedals and position your knees against the inner pads.
Press your knees together through the pads in a controlled arc.
Return to the starting position under control.

cable-hip-adduction.name: Cable Hip Adduction
instructions: Attach an ankle strap to the low cable and secure it to your outside ankle.
Stand perpendicular to the cable with feet together and hold something for balance.
Pull your leg across your body in front of your standing leg.
Return under control and repeat, then switch sides.

machine-hip-abductor.name: Machine Hip Abductor
instructions: Sit upright in the thigh abductor machine with your lower back against the pad.
Place your feet on the pedals with knees bent and against the outer pads.
Press your knees outward through the pads in a controlled arc.
Return to the starting position under control.

cable-hip-abduction.name: Cable Hip Abduction
instructions: Attach an ankle strap to the low cable and secure it to your inside ankle.
Stand perpendicular to the cable with feet together and hold something for balance.
Raise your leg away from your body, keeping it fairly straight.
Return under control and repeat, then switch sides.

standing-hip-abduction.name: Standing Hip Abduction
instructions: Stand upright holding something for balance if needed.
Raise one leg out to the side while keeping it straight and your torso stable.
Lower under control and repeat, then switch sides.

loop-band-standing-hip-adduction.name: Loop Band Standing Hip Adduction
instructions: Anchor a loop band low on a fixed pole and stand perpendicular with the band around your inside ankle.
Hold the pole for support and pull your inside leg across your body, keeping the leg straight.
Return under control and repeat, then switch sides.

step-up.name: Step Up
instructions: Stand upright 3–6 inches in front of a plyo box or aerobic step.
Shift your weight onto your lead leg and place your other foot on the box.
Drive through your lead leg to stand tall on the box with both feet together.
Step back down under control and repeat, alternating the lead leg as prescribed.

dumbbell-step-up.name: Dumbbell Step Up
instructions: Stand facing a box or bench holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides.
Place one foot on the box and drive through that leg to stand on top.
Bring your trailing foot up beside your lead foot without pushing off the back leg.
Step back down under control and repeat, then switch legs.

lateral-step-up.name: Lateral Step Up
instructions: Stand with one side facing the step, feet hip-width apart.
Step laterally onto the box with the leg closest to the step.
Straighten your knee to stand tall on the box.
Lower the opposite foot back to the floor, then your starting leg, and switch sides.

reverse-crunch.name: Reverse Crunch
instructions: Lie on your back with legs extended and arms at your sides, palms down.
Brace your core and pull your knees toward your chest, shins parallel to the floor.
Curl your pelvis off the floor by squeezing your lower abs.
Lower your legs under control back to the starting position.

leg-pull-in.name: Leg Pull-In
instructions: Lie on your back with legs extended and arms at your sides.
Brace your core and raise your knees toward your chest.
Pause briefly with thighs near your torso.
Lower your legs under control without letting your heels rest heavily on the floor.

bodyweight-squat-hold.name: Bodyweight Squat Hold
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart and core braced.
Sit your hips back and bend your knees into a squat.
Descend until thighs are roughly parallel and knees are near 90 degrees.
Hold the bottom position for the prescribed time while keeping your chest up.

butt-kick.name: Butt Kick
instructions: Stand tall with feet hip-width apart and hands resting on your glutes.
Quickly bend one knee to kick your heel toward your hand.
Return that foot to the floor and immediately alternate legs.
Keep the movement quick and rhythmic for the prescribed duration.

runners-butt-kick.name: Runners Butt Kick
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, core braced and chest up.
Pump your arms in a running motion as you drive one knee forward.
Kick your heel toward your glute on the same side.
Quickly switch legs and continue at a steady cardio pace for the prescribed duration.

mountain-climber.name: Mountain Climber
instructions: Start in a high plank with hands just outside shoulder width.
Drive one knee toward your chest while keeping your hips low.
Explosively switch legs, alternating in a running motion.
Maintain a braced core and steady pace for the prescribed duration.

duck-walk.name: Duck Walk
instructions: Squat down with hands clasped behind your head.
Stay low as you step forward with one foot, then the other.
Keep your chest up and continue alternating steps for the prescribed distance or time.

wall-sit.name: Wall Sit
instructions: Press your back flat against a wall and walk your feet forward.
Slide down until your knees are bent to about 90 degrees.
Extend your arms in front of you for balance.
Hold the position for the prescribed time while keeping thighs parallel to the floor.

box-squat.name: Box Squat
instructions: Set the barbell just below shoulder height and place a plyo box 1–2 feet in front of the rack.
Brace your core, duck under the bar, and rest it on your upper back before stepping back to the box.
Keep your chest up and heels planted as you sit your hips back and down toward the box.
Lightly touch the box without fully relaxing at the bottom, then drive through your feet to stand.
Maintain knee tracking over your toes throughout each rep.

cable-underhand-tricep-pushdown.name: Cable Underhand Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Attach a straight bar to a high cable pulley and grip it with palms facing up at shoulder width.
Stand tall with a slight forward lean, elbows pinned at your sides, and core braced.
Extend your elbows to press the bar down until your arms are straight.
Squeeze your triceps at the bottom, then return under control without letting your elbows drift forward.

hammerstrength-iso-row.name: Hammerstrength Iso Row
instructions: Sit at the Hammerstrength iso row machine with your chest against the pad.
Grip the handles with a neutral or overhand grip and brace your core.
Pull the handles toward your torso, driving your elbows back at about 45 degrees.
Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the pull.
Return the handles under control to the starting position.

cable-one-arm-underhand-tricep-extension.name: Cable One Arm Underhand Tricep Extension
instructions: Attach a single handle to a high cable pulley and grip it underhand with one hand.
Stand with a slight forward lean, upper arm fixed at your side, and core braced.
Extend your elbow to press the handle down until your arm is straight.
Pause briefly, then return under control.
Complete all reps on one arm before switching sides.

chest-dip.name: Chest Dip
instructions: Grip parallel bars and lean your torso slightly forward with elbows flared out.
Lower yourself with control until you feel a stretch across your chest.
Press through your palms to drive your body up without locking your elbows.
Keep a slight forward lean throughout to emphasize the chest.
Feel the work mainly in your chest with some triceps involvement.

reverse-grip-pull-down.name: Reverse Grip Pull Down
instructions: Sit upright with thighs under the support pads and grasp the bar with an underhand grip.
Start with elbows bent and tucked at your sides.
Pull the bar toward your upper chest by driving your elbows down and back.
Squeeze your lats at the bottom without excessive leaning.
Return the bar with control to full arm extension.

shotgun-row.name: Shotgun Row
instructions: Set the pulley to the lowest position and attach a handle.
Grab the handle with an overhand grip and step back into a wide staggered stance.
Brace your core and hinge forward toward the base of the pulley.
Row the handle to your side by driving your elbow back close to your body.
Extend your arm back to the start and repeat, then switch sides.

single-leg-curl.name: Single Leg Curl
instructions: Sit upright in a leg curl machine with the top pad above your knees and your working ankle on the lower pad.
Grip the handles for support and keep your torso stable.
Curl your heel down and back by bending one knee through a controlled arc.
Squeeze your hamstring at the bottom of the movement.
Return to the start and complete all reps before switching legs.

side-lunge.name: Side Lunge
instructions: Stand tall with feet hip-width apart and hands on your hips or held in front of you.
Shift your weight onto one leg and step the other foot out to the side.
Bend the stepping knee while keeping the trailing leg relatively straight.
Lower until the working thigh is roughly parallel to the floor.
Drive through the bent leg to return to the starting position, then repeat on the other side.

pallof-press.name: Pallof Press
instructions: Stand sideways to a cable set at chest height with feet hip-width apart.
Hold the handle at the center of your chest with both hands and tension in the cable.
Brace your core and press the handle straight out in front of you without letting it drift.
Hold briefly, then pull the handle back to your chest with control.
Complete all reps on one side before switching to face the other direction.

standing-cable-core-twist.name: Standing Cable Core Twist
instructions: Set a cable to chest height and stand perpendicular to the stack a few feet away.
Grasp the handle with both hands at chest height near the anchor point.
Keep your arms extended and rotate your torso away from the cable while bracing your core.
Control the return to the starting position without letting the weight pull you off balance.
Repeat for the prescribed reps, then switch sides.

cable-wood-chop.name: Cable Wood Chop
instructions: Attach a handle to the highest pulley position and stand with your side facing the stack.
Grip the handle with both hands and reach up toward the pulley with a slight hip turn.
Brace your core and pull the handle diagonally down across your body toward the opposite knee.
Allow a small hip hinge as you chop without rounding your spine.
Return under control to the high start position and repeat, then switch sides.

hip-thrust-ac1b456c-4d43-4cbd-bcdc-a8a51.name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie face up on the floor with feet flat about shoulder-width apart.
Brace your core and tuck your pelvis slightly to keep your lower back neutral.
Drive through your heels and squeeze your glutes to raise your hips.
Lift until your body forms a straight line from knees to shoulders.
Lower your hips with control back to the floor.

barbell-glute-bridge-10af9c2c-1374-4259-.name: Barbell Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on your back with a barbell across your hips and feet flat on the floor.
Brace your core and set your feet about shoulder-width apart.
Drive through your heels and squeeze your glutes to raise your hips.
Lift until your shoulders, hips, and knees form a straight line without overextending your lower back.
Lower your hips under control back to the floor.
